name: Steel March
description: The Ironmarch Union advances behind walls of their own construction. Eight missions of engineering supremacy.

missions.name: Forward Deployment
missions.briefing: Establish a FOB in contested territory before any other faction can claim it.
objectives: Build a forward base before turn 5

missions.name: The Road to War
missions.briefing: Build a rapid road network to rush reinforcements to the front.
objectives: Deliver reinforcements to the front line
missions.twist: Kragmore will send Dozer units to destroy the roads — defend them.

missions.name: Trench Warfare
missions.briefing: Valkyr air power is devastating Ironmarch advance units. Dig in and hold.
objectives: Hold the trench line for 12 minutes
missions.twist: Bastion will probe from the south while Valkyr attacks from above.

missions.name: The Siege Engine
missions.briefing: A Bastion city must fall. Deploy Juggernaut siege units and break the walls.
missions.twist: Kragmore will opportunistically attack Ironmarch's rear during the siege.

missions.name: Sea Crossing
missions.briefing: Island resources require amphibious assault. Ironmarch must adapt.
objectives: Land 5 combat units on the target island
missions.twist: Valkyr will strafe the landing zone — establish AA cover on the beach first.

missions.name: Attrition
missions.briefing: Three factions converge. The supply lines must hold while the front advances.
objectives: Advance to the central cordite node
missions.twist: Supply line trucks will be targeted — escort them at all times.

missions.name: The Signal
missions.briefing: An Arcloft surveillance tower has been feeding Ironmarch positions to all enemies. Destroy it.
objectives: Hold the communication blackout zone for 5 minutes
missions.twist: Without Arcloft surveillance, enemy factions will fight each other — exploit the chaos.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: The Ironmarch war machine has been built for one purpose: this moment. Take the Cordite Nexus.
objectives: Establish a fortified perimeter around the Nexus
Destroy all enemy forces in the central zone
missions.twist: Ironmarch's walls can hold against multiple factions — use them to channel enemy attacks.
